data.body:
## Description

Update documentation to reflect the new shared sub-workflow architecture:

### CLAUDE.md
- Architecture section: Add entries for shared scrutiny pipeline, value/effort scorer, and scrutiny:pending gate
- Quick reference: Update brainstorm and roadmap entries to note they use shared sub-workflows

### Skill SKILL.md files (update reviewer prompt paths)
Update any skill that references old brainstorm/docs/reviewers/ or roadmap/docs/reviewers/ paths to point to the consolidated shared location (from Story 1437-7eaf).

Files to check: brainstorm, roadmap, preplanning, implementation-plan, design-wireframe, design-review, retro SKILL.md files.

### Remove .test-index RED marker

SAFEGUARD FILE: CLAUDE.md and all SKILL.md files are protected per rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: CLAUDE.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (if old paths remain)
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md (if old paths remain)
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references shared scrutiny pipeline
  Verify: grep -q 'shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references value/effort scorer
  Verify: grep -q 'value-effort-scorer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No old reviewer prompt paths in skill files
  Verify: { grep -rq 'brainstorm/docs/reviewers/\|roadmap/docs/reviewers/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/*/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q '\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
